subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-04 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Just now I was perusing a journal which discoursed upon the theme of society. Though it could not well express its intent, yet its purpose was that society [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حالا یک روزنامه می خواندم از جهت جامعه بحث می کرد.  نمی توانست خوب تعبیر کند اما مقصد این بود که جامعه
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
